# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  vmName:
  vmSize:
  adminUsername:
  adminPassword:
  osType:
resources:
  virtualNetwork:
    type: 'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks'
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: ${vmName}-vn
    location: 'East US'
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - '10.1.0.0/16'
      subnets:
        - name: default
          properties:
            privateAddressAllocationMethod: Dynamic

  publicIP:
    type: 'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses'
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: ${vmName}-pip
    location: 'East US'
    sku: 'Standard'
    properties:
      publicIPAddressType: Static

  nic:
    type: 'Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces'
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: ${vmName}-nic
    location: 'East US'
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: default
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            publicIPAddress:
              id: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses", "${vmName}-pip")]'

  storageAccount:
    type: 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: ${vmName}sa
    location: 'East US'
    sku: { name: Standard_LRS, tier: Standard }

  vm:
    type: 'Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines'
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: ${vmName}
    location: 'East US'
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: ${vmSize}
      osDisk:
        createOption: FromImage
        managedDisk:
          storageAccountType: Premium_LRS
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: '[resourceId("Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces", "${vmName}-nic")]'
      osProfile:
        adminUsername: ${adminUsername}
        adminPassword: '${adminPassword}'
        windowsConfiguration:
          provisionVMAgent: 'true'

  osDisk:
    type: 'Microsoft.Compute/disks'
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: ${vmName}-os-disk
    location: 'East US'
    properties:
      createOption: FromImage
      managedDisk:
        storageAccountType: Premium_LRS

  dataDisk:
    type: 'Microsoft.Compute/disks'
    apiVersion: '2020-06-01'
    name: ${vmName}-data-disk
    location: 'East US'
    properties:
      createOption: FromImage
      managedDisk:
        storageAccountType: Premium_LRS
